auth_notes: Requires a standard Authorization: Bearer <token> header for REST API calls. Some providers also require an Organization ID or Project ID in the header.
rate_limits: Typically 60-100 requests per minute for management API; concurrent call limits vary by subscription tier (usually 2-50+).
gotchas: Webhooks are asynchronous; n8n must be configured to handle 'call.ended' events to retrieve transcripts.
Tool/Function calling requires strict JSON schema definitions within the HTTP request body.
High-latency n8n processing can cause delays if the agent is waiting for a 'Server Tool' response during a live call.
research_notes: The integration relies heavily on the HTTP Request node to trigger calls. A separate 'Webhook' trigger node is mandatory to receive post-call data like transcripts and cost metrics. If using 'Server Tools' (where the AI agent asks n8n to look up data mid-call), the n8n workflow must respond within 1-2 seconds to avoid awkward silences.
